headline: Assessing Whether Electronic Arts (EA) Looks Overvalued After Recent Steady Share Performance
summary: Short term moves in Electronic Arts stock Electronic Arts (EA) stock has been relatively steady recently, with a 0.3% gain over the past week and a small 0.2% move lower over the past month, compared with a flat one day change. See our latest analysis for Electronic Arts. At a share price of US$201.72, Electronic Arts has seen only mild recent share price moves. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 40.85% and 3 year total shareholder return of 60.36% indicate that momentum has been...
